name: St Briavels & Hewelsfield
highlights: Norman castle in a pretty village, plus an ancient yew-churchyard at Hewelsfield.
points_of_interest: St Briavels Castle (now YHA); Hewelsfield church (1500-year-old yew); Offa's Dyke remnants
food_drink_nearby: The George Inn St Briavels (medieval pub); Brockweir Inn
hazards_notes: English side (Gloucestershire) but 20 min from Monmouth; narrow lanes
